---
name: Task
about: Track a bug, feature, refactor, or other development work.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

# Title - type(optional scope): description

Use Conventional Commit style.

Examples:
- feat: add bank account linking
- fix: prevent duplicate transactions
- refactor: simplify auth middleware

---

## Summary

A brief description of the issue or feature.

---

## Dependencies / Research

Anything that may be required before implementation.

Examples:
- Stripe Financial Connections
- Plaid
- OAuth provider
- Existing auth system
- API documentation
- Related issues

---

## Notes

Additional implementation details, constraints, ideas, edge cases, screenshots, links, or anything else worth remembering.

Examples:
- Must work on mobile.
- Support multiple linked accounts.
- Only US banks for MVP.
- Keep backwards compatibility.
